steps.title: Locate the vertex of the parabola
steps.content: The graph shows a downward-opening parabola representing the projectile's height over time. Reading directly from the graph, the peak (maximum height) occurs at x = 2 seconds, where the height reaches approximately 20 meters.

steps.title: Identify the interval where height is increasing
steps.content: A downward-opening parabola increases from the start up to its vertex, then decreases after. Since the vertex is at x = 2, the height increases throughout the entire interval from x = 0 to x = 2. At x = 0, the height begins near 0 meters; by x = 2, it reaches the peak of 20 meters. That matches choice A — A is correct.
